recommendations.title: The Perfect Secret
recommendations.overview: Seven friends - three women and four men - meet for dinner. Everyone should put their cell phone on the table. No matter what message comes in - anyone can read it and listen to the phone calls. However, this leads to a lot of chaos.

recommendations.title: Four's a Crowd
recommendations.overview: Julián, a divorced man with financial problems, uses a cell phone application to share his car with strangers.

recommendations.title: Cellular
recommendations.overview: A young man receives an emergency phone call on his cell phone from an older woman. She claims to have been kidnapped – and the kidnappers have targeted her husband and child next.

recommendations.title: A Werewolf Boy
recommendations.overview: An unexpected phone call brings an elderly woman to her childhood country cottage, and memories of an orphan boy she knew 47 years ago come flooding back to her.

recommendations.title: Love Again
recommendations.overview: Mira Ray, dealing with the loss of her fiancé, John, sends a series of romantic texts to his old cell phone number… not realizing the number was reassigned to Rob Burns' new work phone. Rob, a journalist, is captivated by the honesty in the beautiful

recommendations.title: Hello
recommendations.overview: Call-center workers receive a phone call from God.

recommendations.title: Drop
recommendations.overview: Violet, a widowed mother on her first date in years, arrives at an upscale restaurant where she is relieved that her date, Henry, is more charming and handsome than she expected. But their chemistry begins to curdle as Violet begins being irritated a

recommendations.title: The Other End of the Line
recommendations.overview: An employee at an Indian call-center travels to San Francisco to be with a guy she falls for over the phone.

recommendations.title: Venus Beauty Institute
recommendations.overview: Aging beautician Angèle, already wounded by a long-ago romance, gets awkwardly dumped at a train station. Witnessing how she turns around a humiliating situation, younger sculptor Antoine becomes so smitten that he breaks up with his fiancée and sets

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.
